verdict: The colored blobs and per-source edge fanning read as a more deliberate, hand-tuned figure, but a dense hairball of green cross-faction edges still converges tightly around the Steel Warriors/Ebon Strongbear hub, so it still partly reads as machine clutter at the center.

still_worth_fixing.observation: In the zoom image, green shared-item edges from Merchants of Qeynos, Knights of Thunder, Order of Three, and League of Antonican Bards all converge into a tight overlapping knot right at Ebon Strongbear/Brin Stolunger in Steel Warriors, recreating the exact convergence problem the fan-by-source fix was meant to solve, just moved to the target side.
still_worth_fixing.fix: Apply the same fan-out logic on arrival: offset edge endpoints by source-angle around the target node's perimeter (or spread across 2-3 sibling nodes in Steel Warriors) instead of all terminating at one point.

still_worth_fixing.observation: Several unlabeled gray dots float with no blob, faction color, or label (top right near Noobie Monsters, isolated dot right of Beta Neutral, one below Qeynos Citizens) - they read as stray noise rather than intentional data.
still_worth_fixing.fix: Either fold these into a faction blob/legend note explaining 'unaffiliated NPC, no dialogue/item links' or reduce their visual weight (smaller, lower opacity) so they don't compete with real clusters.

still_worth_fixing.observation: Inside dense blobs (Merchants of Qeynos, Guards of Qeynos) labels like Zamel, Faren, Guard Corshin, Guard Phaeton, Gharin sit stacked with only ~2px separation and cross directly through edge bundles, hurting legibility even though the zoom is fairly readable.
still_worth_fixing.fix: Increase local label spacing/leader-line offsets specifically in the two densest blobs, or stagger label anchor points left/right of the node column.

still_worth_fixing.observation: Merchants of Qeynos and Circle of Unseen Hands blobs, and Order of Three and Knights of Thunder blobs, have boundaries that nearly touch/overlap, making the Gestalt cluster boundary ambiguous at a glance in the full view.
still_worth_fixing.fix: Add a few more pixels of padding or a subtle stroke gap between adjacent blob polygons so faction membership is unambiguous at overview zoom.

still_worth_fixing.observation: Whitespace is uneven: the top-right and bottom-left quadrants are nearly empty while the center-right (Guards of Qeynos/Steel Warriors/League of Antonican Bards) is very dense.
still_worth_fixing.fix: Rebalance force-layout spacing or manually nudge sparse-quadrant blobs inward to even out canvas density.
